titleStmt.title: SII 25.281: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 281. (A.R. No. 281 of 1908.) SAṄKARANAYIṈĀR KŌYIL, SANKARANAYINAR KOYIL TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the Gōmati-ammaṉ shrine in the Śaṅkaranayiṉār temple.

p.hi: Chaḍaiyavarmaṉ Perumāḷ Daṉmaperumāḷ alias Kulaśēkharadēva Year 3 and śaka 1475: 1553 A.D.

summary.p: This record furnishes the details of date viz., Śaka 1475, regnal year 3, Pramādīcha, Ṟishabha ba 7, Thursday, Aviṭṭa-nakshatra corresponding to 1553 A.D., May 4.

It refers to his son Aḻagaṉ Perumāḷ who was born on the day of the star Mūla and records an order (ōlai) issued by the king to kāriyam-nāyaṉ, kāriyakaṇakku-piḻai-poṟukkum-perumāṇ, Toṇḍargaḷ-kaṇakku śaḍai-uḍaiyāṉ, kaṉmigaḷ, ālaiyakkaṇakku vaḷatturu-vākki and kaḍaikūṭṭu-kaṇakku Kulaśēkara-Maḻavarāyaṇ for the grant of 2 mā of lands, adding the kaṇḍuḻavu opened up for taxation as kāṇiyāṭchai. It states that one mā of land was exempted from the accounts of Variyilār and endowed for the house-site. The details of the boundaries of the house-site (maṉai) and the area of kaṇḍuḻavu lands at Uttamanallūr in Kōṭṭūr-nāḍu and Paṟṟūr in Āri-nāḍu are specified.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu śrīmatvalmīkanādhasya śambhorjayati śāsanam
śāśvatam harihara brahmādibhidhāryya śrī rājapura vāsinaḥ Ā
di caṇḍeśvaraā jñeyam . cakāttam 1000 4 100 7 10 5 mel cellāniṉṟa cuvatti śrī
koccaṭilavaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkiṟavatti ko(ṉ)ṉerimai koṇṭā
ṉ śrīperumāḷ taṉmapaḷuḷRead perumāḷkulacekara tevaṟkku yāṇṭu 3vatu piṟamātica varuṣam Iṭapaṉā
yaṟṟu 7 10 2yum Aparapakkiṣattu cattamiyum piṟakappativāramum [viyā kara] karaṇamum cittayo
kamum peṟṟa Aviṭṭattiṉ nāḷ naṅkumāraṉ mulanaccattirattu Aḻartaṉāṉa
aḻakaṉ ṉāḷRead perumāḷnammuṭa colli tāṉ koḷmuṟaiyum tavirtu namvācal
turkkāṟku Olaivaravirukaiyyiṟ naṅkāriyam nāyaṉum naṅkāriya kaṇak
ku piḻai poṟukkum ḷuRead perumāṉumṉum nam toṇṭarkaḷ kaṇakku caṭai Uṭaiyāṉu
m naṅkaṉmikaḷum nam Ālaiyakkaṇakku vaḷatturuvākkiyum naṅka
ṭai kūṭṭu kaṇakku kulaicekara maḻavarāyaṉum Iṭṭa kaṇakkiṉpaṭi
mutalukku vāṇaṉ Aṭaikkalaṅkāttāṉukku kāṇiyāṭcaiyākak kuṭuttamai
yil coṟu Irunāḻiyum nam kottu kaṇakkiṉ mālai Iṭṭa tiṟampaṭi nilam
Irumāvukku nāṅ kaṇṭuḻavu tiṟantu certtuk kuṭuttapaṭikku koṭṭurṉāṭṭu Irāca Uttama
nallūr caṅkaranārāyaṇap pereriyil pokuṭi pāṭṭattil Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟu taṭi
muṉṟu nilam Araikkāṇi muṉtirikaiyiṉ Āṟumākkāṉiyum taṭi Oṉṟu Arai
kkāṇiyum rūpāy 9pa � piṟivum Āka 2m ñ100yum kūli kūñṉayum Āka 2 100 6 10 7taya Ārināṭṭu
rūpāy 8 10 6 pa � p¿ā ñ perumāḷum paṟṟūr naṅkaṇṭuḻavu tirntu palāṟṟukku varuṣam (1/2) 8 10 9 pa � pa¿ 7 tpā ñ
� sa ¿ 7m � 3 sa ñ yum Āka poṉ Iraṇṭumā ¿ñ 7 10 3(1/4)yum Āka vakai 2ṉāl nilam
Oru māvum namvariyilār kaṇakkilum tavittu maṉaikku Elkai maṟavar
maṉaikku meṟku ñāṉi kuppaiyāṇṭi maṉaikku vaṭakku māṭāpattiyak kaṇakku
maṉaikku kiḻakku kīḻ me(l)lai teruvu
kku teṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉ(ṅ)ku Elkaikku Uḷpaṭṭa maṉai Oṉṟu
m kīḻnokkiya kiṇarum melnokkiya maramum toṭṭamum to
ṭṭak kūṟum Aka candratāravat cantatip piṟavekame cempilum cilai
yilum veṭṭik kaiyāṇṭu koḷḷavum Ivai pāṟka nalla kuṟṟālam .
Digital edition of SII 25.281 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
